summary: Software engineer with experience building data pipelines and web applications in Python and TypeScript. Focused on reliable systems, clean APIs, and measurable impact.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built a data ingestion pipeline in Python that processed 2M records/day, cutting nightly batch time by 35%.
Designed a REST (RESTful) API with FastAPI serving 40+ endpoints consumed by the analytics dashboard.
Added integration tests that raised coverage from 48% to 82% and caught 12 regressions before release.

projects.name: LeafNote
bullets: Built a note-taking web app with offline sync used by 300+ users.
Implemented full-text search over 10k notes with sub-100ms query latency.

leadership.title: Team Lead
bullets: Organized weekly workshops for 50+ members on Git, Python, and web development.
